'''''Red Dog''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The cruiser was attempting to rendezvous with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] when it was destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
